approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

title: SW-008 — Consolidate visual grammar and templates
goal: Define recognisable semantic shapes, state markers, provenance, freshness, uncertainty, accessibility and layout templates.

acceptance.assertion: Semantic tokens and state markers are versioned and renderer-independent.
Software, education, roadmap, timeline, presentation and public-summary templates exist.
Contrast, text alternatives and non-colour state cues are validated.
At least two pilots use the same grammar without becoming visually identical.
